# Yes, There's a Cheaper Option Than Wix — And It's Free for Indian Sellers

Every day, thousands of Indian sellers search for a cheaper option than Wix — and for good reason. Wix looks appealing at first glance, but once you dig into the actual pricing (in INR), the missing India-specific features, and the hidden transaction charges, it stops making sense fast. If you sell online in India and you are still paying for Wix, or about to sign up, this article is for you. There is a permanently free, India-first alternative that gives you UPI payments, WhatsApp orders, Shiprocket shipping, COD support, and an AI store designer — without spending a single rupee.

---

## What Does Wix Actually Cost?

Wix markets itself as a website builder for everyone, but the pricing tells a different story for Indian sellers.

Here is what Wix plans actually cost in India:

| Wix Plan | Monthly Cost (INR approx.) | Ecommerce Included? |
|---|---|---|
| Free | Rs. 0 | No (Wix ads shown, no custom domain) |
| Combo | Rs. 1,100/month | No |
| Unlimited | Rs. 1,700/month | No |
| Business Basic | Rs. 2,000/month | Yes |
| Business Unlimited | Rs. 3,200/month | Yes |
| Business VIP | Rs. 5,200/month | Yes |

To actually sell products online with Wix, you need at minimum the Business Basic plan at around Rs. 2,000 per month. That works out to Rs. 24,000 per year — just to keep your store running.

On top of that, consider these hidden costs:

- **Payment gateway fees**: Wix does not offer a native Indian payment gateway. You need to connect Razorpay or PayU yourself, each of which charges 2% or more per transaction.
- **App market add-ons**: Most useful features (abandoned cart recovery, advanced shipping, WhatsApp chat) require paid third-party apps from the Wix App Market, often adding another Rs. 500–Rs. 2,000 per month.
- **Custom domain**: Not included in most plans.
- **Storage limits**: Plans cap your storage, and going over means upgrading.

For a small business in India selling Rs. 50,000 worth of products per month, you could easily spend Rs. 3,000–Rs. 5,000 per month on Wix alone, before accounting for product sourcing, packaging, or marketing.

---

## What You Are NOT Getting with Wix (The India Problem)

Wix was built for a Western audience. The platform works reasonably well if you are in the US, UK, or Europe. For Indian sellers, the gaps are significant.

**No native UPI support.** UPI is India's most-used payment method. Over 10 billion transactions happen via UPI every month in India. Wix has no native UPI integration. You must configure a third-party gateway that supports UPI, which adds setup time and per-transaction fees.

**No Cash on Delivery (COD) support.** COD accounts for 40–60% of all ecommerce orders in India, especially in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities. Wix does not natively support COD as a payment option. This alone disqualifies it for a massive segment of Indian buyers.

**No Shiprocket integration.** Shiprocket is the dominant shipping aggregator for Indian D2C sellers, offering access to 25+ courier partners from a single dashboard. Wix has no native Shiprocket integration. Setting it up requires workarounds.

**No WhatsApp ordering.** Indian buyers prefer placing orders and asking questions via WhatsApp. Wix does not offer built-in WhatsApp cart or order features. You need a paid plugin.

**No Hindi or regional language support.** Your buyers may be more comfortable in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, or Bengali. Wix's storefront localization for Indian languages is limited and requires workarounds.

**Customer support in Indian time zones.** Wix's primary support operates in Western time zones. If you have a critical issue at 11 PM IST, you may be waiting hours for a response.

---

## The Best Free Alternatives to Wix for Indian Sellers

Here are four solid options if you are actively looking for a cheaper option than Wix.

### 1. DigitalDukandar (digitaldukandar.in)

**Best for**: Indian sellers who want a fully featured free store with UPI, COD, WhatsApp, and Shiprocket built in.

- Free plan: Permanently free, no credit card required, no expiry, no watermark
- UPI payments: Native support
- COD: Built in
- Shiprocket: Direct integration
- WhatsApp orders: Built in
- AI store designer: Included
- Custom domain: Supported

**Cons**: Newer platform, smaller community than global players.

### 2. WooCommerce (via WordPress)

**Best for**: Technically confident sellers who want maximum customization.

- Free plugin, but requires WordPress hosting (Rs. 150–Rs. 500/month)
- Full control over every feature
- Thousands of plugins available

**Cons**: Requires technical setup. Hosting, SSL, and premium plugins add up. Not beginner-friendly.

### 3. Dukaan

**Best for**: Quick WhatsApp-first store creation.

- Simple setup, India-focused
- WhatsApp selling built in
- Basic free plan available

**Cons**: Limited design customization. Paid plans required for advanced features like custom domains and analytics.

### 4. Instamojo

**Best for**: Sellers focused on digital products, services, or simple catalogs.

- India-focused payment gateway with storefront feature
- Free plan available
- Good for invoicing and payment links

**Cons**: Limited ecommerce features compared to full-featured builders. Not ideal for large product catalogs.

## Why DigitalDukandar Is the Best Cheaper Alternative to Wix for India

Among all the Wix alternatives listed above, DigitalDukandar is the only one that is permanently free AND fully equipped for the realities of selling in India.

Here is what you get at zero cost, with no trial period:

**Permanently Free Plan.** No credit card. No expiry date. No Wix-style watermark plastered on your store. Your store stays live forever on the free plan. You only pay if you want premium features.

**Native UPI Payments.** Accept payments directly via UPI from day one. No third-party gateway configuration. No extra per-transaction fees beyond the standard gateway rate.

**Cash on Delivery Built In.** Enable COD with a single toggle. Reach buyers in every corner of India, including those who prefer paying at the door.

**WhatsApp Order Integration.** Every product page includes a WhatsApp order button. Buyers can place orders directly on WhatsApp without going through a separate checkout. This matches how Indian buyers actually prefer to shop.

**Shiprocket Direct Integration.** Connect your Shiprocket account and manage all your shipments — label generation, tracking, courier selection — directly from your DigitalDukandar dashboard. No workarounds or third-party connectors.

**AI Store Designer.** Not just a theme picker. DigitalDukandar includes an AI-powered store designer that regenerates your store's colors, layout, and visual style based on a plain-text description. Tell it "I want a clean minimalist store for handmade candles" and it redesigns your store accordingly.

**Custom Domain Support.** Connect your own domain name (like yourstore.com or yourbrand.in) to your DigitalDukandar store at no additional platform fee.

**No Technical Skills Required.** Store setup takes minutes. Add products, set prices, enable shipping, connect your UPI — your store is live and ready to take orders the same day.

## How to Switch from Wix to DigitalDukandar

Switching is simpler than most sellers expect. Here are the steps:

**Step 1: Create your free DigitalDukandar account.**
Go to [digitaldukandar.in](https://digitaldukandar.in) and sign up. No credit card required. Your store dashboard is ready in under two minutes.

**Step 2: Add your products.**
Use the Products section in your dashboard to add each product — name, price, images, description, and category. If you have a large catalog, you can bulk upload via CSV.

**Step 3: Configure payments.**
Connect your UPI ID for instant payments. Enable Cash on Delivery if you ship across India. Both options take under two minutes to set up.

**Step 4: Set up shipping.**
Connect your Shiprocket account from the Shipping section. Your orders will automatically appear in Shiprocket for fulfillment.

**Step 5: Enable WhatsApp orders.**
Add your WhatsApp business number to activate the WhatsApp order button across your store.

**Step 6: Customize your store design.**
Use the AI designer to match your brand's look and feel, or choose from available themes and customize manually.

**Step 7: Connect your domain and cancel Wix.**
Point your existing domain to DigitalDukandar. Once confirmed, cancel your Wix subscription and stop paying Rs. 2,000+ per month.

The entire migration typically takes two to four hours for a small catalog, and your store is live the same day.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is DigitalDukandar really free forever, or is it a limited-time offer?**

A: The free plan on DigitalDukandar is permanently free with no expiry date and no credit card requirement. There are no watermarks on your store, and your store does not get taken offline after a trial period. Premium features are available as paid upgrades, but the core store functionality — including UPI, COD, WhatsApp orders, and Shiprocket — is free.

**Q: Can I use my own domain name with DigitalDukandar instead of a subdomain?**

A: Yes. DigitalDukandar supports custom domain mapping. You can connect your own .com, .in, or any other domain to your store. The platform does not charge an additional fee for domain connection. You continue to pay your domain registrar (like GoDaddy or Namecheap) the standard annual domain renewal fee.

**Q: What happens to my Wix store content when I switch? Will I lose my product listings?**

A: Wix does not have a one-click export feature for product data. The most reliable method is to export your product list from Wix as a CSV (available from your Wix dashboard under Products), then import that CSV into DigitalDukandar. Images will need to be re-uploaded or re-linked. This is a one-time migration task, not an ongoing burden. Most sellers with fewer than 100 products complete the migration in under four hours.
